meaning: 龙目岛[印度尼西亚南部](在爪哇岛和巴厘岛以东)
examples: Documentation is critical when extending Lombok.
Lombok allows you to enter a parenthetical parameter for that purpose.
Lombok has a clever solution to the boilerplate code problem, however.
The new owl's English name comes from Mount Rinjani, Indonesia's second-highest volcano, located on Lombok.
Violence continued for a third day on the Indonesian vacation island of Lombok.
